zh.lifeSummary: 當Rachel Tolles於大約1702年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可時，她的父親Henry Tolles II34歲，母親Dorothy Thomas39歲。她於1722年11月15日與Joseph Ruggles Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1746年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州利其費爾德享年45歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德費艾費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rachel Tolles于大约1702年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可时，她的父亲Henry Tolles II34岁，母亲Dorothy Thomas39岁。她于1722年11月15日与Joseph Ruggles Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1746年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州利其費爾德享年45岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德費艾費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Tolles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Towles  . This form of the surname has died out in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Towles
meanings: English (Middlesex and Leicestershire): variant of Towle , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Tole and Toll . This form of the surname has now died out in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Rachel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘ewe’ in Hebrew), borne by the beloved wife of Jacob and mother (after long barrenness) of Joseph (Genesis 28–35) and of Benjamin, at whose birth she died. In the Middle Ages and subsequently this was regarded as a characteristically Jewish name, but it is now also popular among Gentiles.

variants.name: Rachelle
meanings: Elaborated form of   Rachel  , as if from French, but actually a recent coinage in English.

en.lifeSummary: When Rachel Tolles was born about 1702, in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Henry Tolles II, was 34 and her mother, Dorothy Thomas, was 39. She married Joseph Ruggles Sr on 15 November 1722, in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. She died in 1746, in Litchfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 45, and was buried in Fairfield, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rachel Tolles est née environ 1702, à Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Henry Tolles II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Thomas, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Joseph Ruggles Sr le 15 novembre 1722, à New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée en 1746, à Litchfield, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Fairfield, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rachel Tolles um 1702 in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Tolles II 34 und ihre Mutter Dorothy Thomas 39. Sie hat am 15. November 1722 in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Joseph Ruggles Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb 1746 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Litchfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Fairfield, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rachel Tolles è nata il circa 1702 nel Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Henry Tolles II, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Dorothy Thomas, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Joseph Ruggles Sr il 15 novembre 1722, nel New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel 1746, nel Litchfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Fairfield, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Rachel Tollesが約1702年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンサイブルークで生まれた時，父Henry Tolles IIは34歳，母Dorothy Thomasは39歳であった。1722年11月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンでJoseph Ruggles Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1746年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州リトチフィールドで45歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ファイルフィールドファイルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rachel Tolles(이)가 대략 1702년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Tolles II(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Thomas(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1722년 11월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐에서 Joseph Ruggles Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1746년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 리트ch필드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 파어필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rachel Tolles nasceu aproximadamente 1702, em Saybrook, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Henry Tolles II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Thomas, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Joseph Ruggles Sr em 15 de novembro de 1722, em New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1746, em Litchfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Fairfield, Fairfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.New Milford, Litchfield, Connecticut, Br: ню милфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rachel Tolles родилась около 1702 г. в местности сеибрук, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Henry Tolles II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Thomas, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joseph Ruggles Sr 15 ноября 1722 г. в местности ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла в 1746 г. в местности личфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности феирфиелд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rachel Tolles nació aproximadamente 1702, en Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Henry Tolles II, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Dorothy Thomas, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Joseph Ruggles Sr el 15 de noviembre de 1722, en New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en 1746, en Litchfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Fairfield, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
